FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Bullish Momentum Sustained Above MA20 Amid Geopolitical De-escalation
tldr_points: Price holding strongly above MA20 support
Geopolitical easing in Tehran reducing safe-haven JPY demand
Fed signals maintaining USD strength relative to JPY
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY maintains bullish posture above 158.17 as geopolitical risks subside and Fed signals support USD strength.
FX.comment: Bullish momentum supported by MA20 and reduced safe-haven JPY demand.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: AI stocks near buy points amid Iran deal optimism
Technical resistance at 7550 pivotal for continuation
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 rebounds from MA20 support as Iran deal optimism fuels risk appetite. AI stocks near buy zones.
STOCKS.comment: Momentum and fundamentals align at MA20 support

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: Institutional Outflows and Stablecoin Depeg Pressure Price Below MA20
tldr_points: BTC/USD trading below MA20 at 76,593 amid $1.26B ETF outflow pressure
Stablecoin depeg events and ECB regulatory warnings create systemic risk
Strategic reserve bill revision signals reduced near-term government demand
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD bears control as price breaches below MA20 amid ETF outflows and stablecoin turbulence.
CRYPTO.comment: Price below MA20 with bearish fundamental backdrop favors short-side continuation.
